claims.summary: A failed connection must back off and recover without defeating graceful shutdown.
claims.disposition: verify bounded backoff, reconnect scheduling, and shutdown-during-backoff regressions

claims.summary: Binary and text telemetry messages must reach the same versioned decoder and accepted-message path.
claims.disposition: verify binary and text dispatch plus one-pass canonical decode fixtures

claims.summary: Unsupported protocol majors must surface a specific mismatch while retaining the last valid sample.
claims.disposition: verify protocol status, explicit mismatch logging, counter increments, and last-valid retention

claims.summary: Malformed bytes must not panic or terminate the subscriber.
claims.disposition: verify parse-error recording and false-return behavior on malformed JSON

claims.summary: Shared-state lock pressure needs evidence before moving message accounting to a channel.
claims.disposition: implement read-only telemetry integration timing and leave channel or buffering changes unwired
